embeddingText: Tillverkning av trävaror, träförädling, snickerikomponenter, trädetaljer, kork, rotting, halmprodukter, specialtillverkning, legotillverkning, bearbetning, referensprojekt, materialfokus, offertförfrågan.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold for companies that make, process or supply wood-based goods rather than primarily installing them on site.
Prefer this scaffold when products, materials, dimensions, finishing or manufacturing capacity are central to the offer.
References should emphasize delivered products or projects rather than only team presentation.
